inputs.description: Follow Task 11 in the plan exactly. Create frontend/src/components/network/ControlBar.tsx — filter controls with connection type toggle buttons (colored by type), century dropdown, role dropdown, and agent count slider. IMPORTANT: The slider must be debounced (300ms) using useDebouncedCallback hook with local state for smooth dragging. Use the EXACT code from the plan (includes AgentSlider sub-component). Commit.
